scope: hexa-lang ecosystem improvement opportunities — 6-cycle ω finding consolidation
approach: completeness frame — weakest evidence link surfaced first; trigger from concrete failure (audio empirical run)

weakest_to_strongest_evidence.evidence_strength: LIVE FAILURE — caused current session's audio empirical run to abort
weakest_to_strongest_evidence.spread: 864 .hexa files use stat -f %z; 743 use date +%s%N; interpreter binary itself bakes BSD stat
weakest_to_strongest_evidence.fix_cost: low (R1.2: wc -c migration) to medium (R1.3: native interpreter builtin)
weakest_to_strongest_evidence.recommended_patch: R1.2 wc -c stdlib helper + sed migration of 864 sites

weakest_to_strongest_evidence.evidence_strength: DOCUMENTED — p4_plan.md records the quirk; reproducible every remote invocation
weakest_to_strongest_evidence.recommended_patch: R2.2 hexa.real init: setvbuf(stdout, _IONBF) — single line

weakest_to_strongest_evidence.evidence_strength: OBSERVED — ubu1 rejected at 23934MB vs 24576MB threshold (642MB margin), 300s lockout
weakest_to_strongest_evidence.fix_cost: low (R5.4: PSI hard-reject) to medium (R5.1: exponential backoff)
weakest_to_strongest_evidence.recommended_patch: R5.4 + R5.1 — PSI hard-reject + exponential backoff in same change

weakest_to_strongest_evidence.evidence_strength: OBSERVED — /tmp/omega_test.hexa triggered 4-host probe before docker fallback
weakest_to_strongest_evidence.recommended_patch: R3.1+R3.2 combined — eliminate 6-12s wasted probe time

weakest_to_strongest_evidence.evidence_strength: DESIGN — known tradeoff between safety and ergonomics
weakest_to_strongest_evidence.fix_cost: low (R4.2: user-extensible safe-argv) to high (R4.1: AST-based safe-script detector)

weakest_to_strongest_evidence.evidence_strength: AUDIT — gaps identified; no observed failure (cache off by default)
weakest_to_strongest_evidence.recommended_patch: R6.1+R6.2 — fix env_hash + flock; then enable by default (R6.3)

P3_higher_cost_long_term: R1.3 native file_size builtin in interpreter (Ω-H1)

minimal_winning_patch_set.name: hexa-lang Mk.I — portability + visibility floor
patches: R1.2 (Ω-H1) — stdlib fn file_size() + cross-repo migration
R5.4 (Ω-H5) — PSI hard-reject (>80 reject regardless of RAM)
minimal_winning_patch_set.validation: audio empirical cycle re-run should complete end-to-end

rejected_paths.reason: high blast radius; do via stdlib helper migration with grep+sed staged review

summary_one_line: hexa-lang has 6 visible improvement axes; weakest evidence link is Ω-H1 portability (864 sites + interpreter binary) which directly broke this session's empirical run. Minimum winning patch set = R1.2+R2.2+R3.2+R5.4, estimated 1-2 days, validates by re-running ω-audio empirical end-to-end.
honest_scope_caveat: this is analytic synthesis from resolver source + session traces; no patch was implemented. Effort estimates are gut-check, not measured.
what_was_NOT_done: regression test for any of the 17 limits
audit of remaining hexa-lang internal tooling (drift_scanner, raw_audit, roadmap_*)
